title0: Master your workflow, liberate your mind
title1: The intelligent workspace where your projects, tasks, and creative ideas converge. Built for small teams.
login: Capture instantly, organize effortlessly, and delete with ease. Your productivity will thank you!

cloud.title: Cloud Sync
cloud.text: All your projects and tasks are securely saved on the cloud, allowing you to access them from anywhere, at any time.

management.title: Task Management
management.text: Effortlessly organize and prioritize your tasks, and stay on top of your projects with our intuitive and user-friendly interface.

collaborate.title: Collaboration
collaborate.text: Invite team members to collaborate on projects, assign tasks, and track progress in real-time.

public_templates.title: Community Library
public_templates.text: Explore and use templates created by other users to jumpstart your projects instantly.

private_templates.title: Private Templates
private_templates.text: Standardize your processes by saving your own workflows as personal reusable templates.

metrics.title: Smart Metrics
metrics.text: Visualize your team's performance and project progress with intuitive charts.
